Prince Sultan Military Medical City · Medical Services Pharmacy Stock & Reorder Analytics
— — — —

Drop in both files to compute coverage and reorder quantities. You can select several withdrawals files at once (multiple warehouses); the latest consumption baseline is saved on this device, so next time a new stock file alone is enough. Only medicines (NUPCO codes starting with 5) are included.

Built for the PSMMC planning department · every calculation runs locally in your browser — no data leaves this page.
